--- Menu Page: https://www.apachexlr.com/dinner ---
DINNER OLD | Apache XLR
top of page
DINNER
We can only accept (1) form of payment at the table. However, if you would like to split payment you're able to at our POS station
HOUSE RULES:
Welcome! We're so glad to have you! Before we get this thing started, let's get acquainted with some house rules.
As you may know, Apache is like no other. We bring the food, the funk, and the family! We provide a vibe like no other, but with great fun comes some rules!
- Please be patient with us. Staffing is short nationwide and our team members do their best to provide an unforgettable experience for all our guests. Be nice to them.
- Alcohol Sales are final. We understand you may like your drinks a certain way and we would be happy to add a shot for an additional price. If you want something strong we recommend a shot of your choice straight up.
- Tabs will include an 18% gratuity to show your appreciation for their service and to ensure we can keep our doors fully staffed to provide you the best possible service and experience! Please Speak with your manager if the service isn't up to Apache Standards
- Unique from other restaurants we provide dinner AND a show. This means that unlike other restaurants our kitchen is not paced and instead receives an influx of tickets all at once when the doors open. Keeping this in mind please be patient with our kitchen as they are preparing your meals to their quickest capability while still providing quality!
- Most importantly, please enjoy yourself! We hope you enjoy an evening celebrating the arts and the community that Apache has been building for over 20 years, welcome to the family!
SERVICE CHARGE
- Tabs will include an 18% gratuity to show your appreciation for their service and to ensure we can keep our doors fully staffed to provide you the best possible service and experience! Please Speak with your manager if the service isn't up to Apache Standards
APPETIZERS
APACHE JERK WINGS
10 pieces of flavorful Baked chicken wings marinated in a sweet and spicy jerk sauce.
Limited Supply
​
Add Fries and make it a meal.
VEGGIE EGGROLLS
two perfectly fried egg rolls. Made just for our Plant based Friends!
MAC & CHEESE BITES $9
Panko crusted Mac & Cheese paired with our housemade roasted-tomato marinara for dipping.
HUMMUS $11
Black Eyed Pea Hummus, Seasonal Vegetables, Toasted Pita Bread.
SHRIMP BASKET $16
Fried shrimp with a side of fries; served in a cast iron pan.
ENTREES
SALMON CROQUETTES AND GRITS
Perfectly fried home-made salmon croquettes paired with rich creamy grits and a tomato bacon gravy
APACHE BURGER
Our Angus beef patty topped with lettuce, tomatoes, pickles, cheddar cheese, caramelized onions, crispy bacon and our house jalapeno aoili.
SPINACH SALAD $12
Fresh Spinach Salad, Strawberries, Shaved Carrots, Feta Cheese, Candied Pecans, and homemade Honey Vinaigrette.
​
Add On: Chicken ($8), Salmon ($11), Shrimp ($12)
APACHE SEASONAL SALAD $12
Mixed Green Salad, Strawberries, Shaved Carrots, Feta Cheese, Candied Pecans, and homemade Honey Vinaigrette.
​
Add On: Chicken ($8), Salmon ($11), Shrimp ($12)
APACHE CHICKEN ALFREDO $26
Savory Alfredo-Style Pasta Dish with Chicken.
​
Make it chicken and shrimp for just $2!
SALMON MAC&CHEESE $24
Salmon Filet served with our rich baked Mac&Cheese.
CLASSIC STEAK: MARKET PRICE
Steak, Creamy Yukon Mashed Potatoes, Side Garden Salad. Please ask Your Server.
FRIED PORK CHOPS $23
Two Pork Chop, Creamy Yukon Mashed Potatoes & Sauteed Spinach . no sub.
SOUTHERN STYLE FRIED CHICKEN DINNER $24
Boneless Skinless Chicken Breast, Yummy Brussels Sprouts, Creamy Yukon Mashed potatoes & Pecan Honey
FISH AND GRITS $20.50
Corn Meal Dusted fish, Geechie Boy Blue Cheese Grits, Heirloom Tomato & Pepper Gravy
HOT CHICKEN SANDWICH $18
Deep Fried Chicken Breast, Kashmiri and Cayenne Pepper Sauce, Toasted Bun, House Pickles, Mayo. Served with a side of Fries.
SUNDAY SUPPER NACHOS $18
Slow Braised Pot Roast, Queso Dip, Vine Ripe Tomatoes, Fresh Jalapeños, Cilantro.
Chicken Nachos $17
Shrimp Nachos $19
SIDES
SAUTEED SPINACH $6
SIDE SALAD $6
Mixed greens, Strawberries, Shaved Carrots, Feta Cheese, Candied Pecans, House-made Honey Vinaigrette.
DESSERTS
TRES LES CAKE $10
HOMEMADE CHEESECAKE $12
Our classic homemade cheesecake with your choice of either Strawberry toppings or Caramel Candied-Pecans toppings.
ALL INCLUDE AN 18% GRATUITY.
**Consuming raw or undercooked meats, poultry, seafood, shellfish, or eggs may increase your risk of food borne illness, especially if you have certain medical conditions.*
FOR FEEDBACK, QUESTIONS, AND MORE CONTENT, PLEASE FOLLOW US ON OUR IG @APACHEXLR.
